  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch detected during inspection.",
    "Overcurrent protective device rating exceeds the allowable ampacity of the connected conductor."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the overcurrent protective device with one of a lower, compliant rating matching the conductor ampacity, or replace the conductor with one of a larger size that matches the breaker rating."
  ],
  "rationale": "A mismatch where the breaker ampacity exceeds the conductor's allowable ampacity violates NEC 240.4 and poses a severe fire hazard due to lack of proper thermal protection for the wiring.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240.4",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
